newsSince: No fresh material company-specific news in the June 9-23 window. INTT's Q1 2026 print (revenue $33.9M, +27% YoY, returned to profit, raised FY26 revenue guide to $130-135M and backlog +35.5%) landed in early May, before the window. The only June item is a routine 18,000-share director equity grant (June 17) and an M&T loan-facility draw extension to Aug 28, 2026.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent under-covered AI supply chain: thermal/test optionality for advanced packaging intact. The raised FY26 guide and +35% backlog already known pre-window; no new June catalyst. Tiny $0.23B cap keeps it speculative deep in the tail. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Backlog +35.5%, FY26 guide raised to $130-135M; operating leverage off a small base if advanced-packaging test demand broadens.
verdicts.neutral: Strong Q1 already in print; no fresh June data point to re-rate on this lens.
verdicts.bear: $0.23B micro-cap, semicap cyclicality, AI-node linkage indirect vs core semicap names.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Advanced-packaging burn-in/test demand broadening beyond core semicap.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Semicap cycle reversal on a thin revenue base.
